extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIČ Primož took a positioned sprint finish on the harbor-side finale, holding off EVENEPOEL Remco by 4 seconds after late corners disrupted leadouts.
tactical_patterns: ROGLIČ attacked the technical harbor finish before leadout trains organized, exploiting positioning over pure sprint speed.
EVENEPOEL boxed by late corners despite fastest finish speed, revealing positioning vulnerability in technical sprint finales.
Breakaway fractured on 500m ramp before final circuit, suggesting late steep pitches effective for controlling strong breaks.

rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: won positioning battle in technical sprint despite not having fastest finish speed
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: fastest finisher but lost 4 seconds due to poor corner positioning, suggests weakness in chaotic technical sprints
rider_signals.ONLEY Oscar: neutral: attempted solo bridge to break but was absorbed, showing aggressive intent early in stage race
rider_signals.MIQUEL Pau: positive: won penultimate climb from breakaway, indicating strong form on steep pitches
rider_signals.BOL Jetse: neutral: took intermediate sprint from break, conserving energy for stage racing over sprinting
